goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'leave after 09:30'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time', 'train ID', and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to bishops stortford
The train should leave on monday and should leave after 09:30
Make sure you get arrival time, train ID, and travel time
